name: AI Persona OS
description: The complete operating system for OpenClaw agents. 24 souls (JARVIS, Thanos, Mary Poppins, Rook...), SOUL.md Maker, memory tools, Discord routing fix, native heartbeat, never-forget context. By Jeff J Hunter.

workspaceOverride.description: Optional override for the workspace path. Takes precedence over agents.defaults.workspace and the $OPENCLAW_WORKSPACE env var.

useNativeProtocol.description: Emit the AI Persona OS status as a heartbeat_prompt_contribution. Replaces v2.0's HEARTBEAT.md (~600 tokens) with a ~30-token deterministic line. Disable to opt out entirely.

format.description: Heartbeat contribution format. compact = one line (~30 tokens). verbose = adds bulleted breakdown + routing warnings (~80-130 tokens).

memoryLimitKB.description: MEMORY.md size budget in KB. Used by persona_status, persona_doctor, and the heartbeat hook to compute the % indicator.
